title: Fake Blocks
description: This mod adds many fake blocks, all of which you can walk through!
body:
## Fake Blocks

This mod adds a lot, including:

- Fakinator
- 16 different fake blocks
- Survival friendly crafting recipies

### Fakinator 5000
The fakinator is a tool in the game used to craft fake blocks. It is crafted like this:
![crafting_recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/822ee29baa52494ef14729eb464823e4970501bc.png)
To use the fakinator, simply put it in the crafting recipe with the item you would like to become fake. The fakinator has 600 uses, allowing you to craft just over 9 stacks of fake blocks per Fakinator.

### Fake Blocks
There are 16 different types of fake blocks currently in the game. More will be added later on. Fake blocks list:
1. Dirt
2. Stone
3. Deepslate
4. Smooth Stone
5. Cobblestone
6. Mossy Cobblestone
7. Cobbled Deepslate
8. Blackstone
9. Chiseled Polished Blackstone
10. Chiseled Red Sandstone
11. Chiseled Sandstone
12. Chiseled Stone Bricks
13. Cracked Stone Bricks
14. Cut Red Sandstone
15. Cut Sandstone
16. Dripstone Block

**More blocks coming soon!**
